EmailTemplate.description: Response for if a referee is chasing an update on their referral.
EmailTemplate.name: RAF - Referee Chasing Update (new process)
EmailTemplate.subject: Your RAF Enquiry
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for contacting Kingsbridge. I have added some information below about how our RAF scheme works to help answer your query.
Can I see the status of my referrals?
You will automatically receive email notifications when – - Any one you refer joins our RAF scheme - Any one you refer qualifies (this is the step when vouchers are sent)
Both of these emails provide a link where you can view your total referrals and qualified referrals.
Please note, due to data protections regulations all data is anonymised.
Why hasn’t my referral qualified yet?
There can be a delay between a referral joining the scheme and qualifying, this can be due to – - A gap between a referral receiving a quote and making a decision to purchase - A gap between the purchase and start date of a referral’s policy - The legal cooling-off period following the start date of an insurance policy
Hopefully, the above will help to answer your query. But if you have any further questions, please don't hesitate to get in touch.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
